title: BPstat (Banco de Portugal) — Interest rates applied by banks in Portugal to loans and deposits (subset: first 100 of 263 series in domain)
time_coverage: 1965-12 to 2026-05 (varies by series; some series start as early as 1965, most MFI-harmonized series start ~2003)
units: percentage (annualized agreed rate / APR / etc., described in series metadata)
license_terms: Banco de Portugal / BPstat open data API, free reuse with attribution
notes: Domain 21 'Interest rates' has 263 total series; only the first 100 (page 1) were downloaded in this session due to size/time discipline — filename suffixed p1of3 to signal 2 more pages (100 each) remain if deeper coverage is wanted later. Retrieved via the same BPstat REST API used for the GDP dataset (data/raw/banco-portugal/gdp-expenditure-series-since-1977/). Covers deposit and loan interest rates by sector/instrument/maturity for Portuguese banks.
